name: American State Bank
description_short: American State Bank is a Texas-based community bank founded in 1911, offering personal and business banking services including checking, savings, CDs, and money market accounts with FDIC insurance.
description_long:
American State Bank has operated as a community bank since 1911, establishing itself as a regional financial institution serving customers in Texas. The bank maintains a localized presence with multiple branches concentrated in the Tyler, Texas area, including locations in Tyler and Lindale, supported by extended drive-through and Saturday hours.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of retail and business banking products. For consumers, these include personal checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs) with competitive rates (6-month Jumbo CD at 3.41% APY noted), money market accounts branded as "Pinnacle Money Market Account," and iChecking accounts that earn interest and rewards on daily balances. Business customers can access business checking accounts, business credit cards, and cash management tools. All deposit products carry FDIC insurance up to $250,000. The bank also offers digital banking services, Zelle integration for peer-to-peer money transfers, and online account access.

American State Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on personalized service and community roots. The institution markets itself on long-standing relationships since 1911 and positions customer service as a priority, with dedicated phone lines and branch locations designed for convenient access. Their focus on competitive deposit rates, particularly for jumbo CDs and money market products, suggests positioning as a rates-competitive regional option. The bank maintains traditional banking hours with extended drive-through service, appealing to customers who prefer in-person banking relationships.

As a regional community bank, American State Bank's primary limitation is geographic scope—all visible branch locations are in the Tyler area of Texas, making it unsuitable for customers outside this region seeking physical banking access. The website content does not reveal information about mortgage lending, investment services, or broader commercial banking products that larger institutions typically offer. For consumers seeking a local community banking relationship with competitive deposit rates in the Tyler area, the bank represents a viable option; however, customers in other states or seeking comprehensive financial services would need to look elsewhere.
services: Personal checking accounts with interest and rewards (iChecking)
Personal savings accounts for multiple life stages
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) including Jumbo CD products
Online account enrollment and password recovery
pros: FDIC-insured deposits up to $250,000 on all accounts
Competitive 6-month Jumbo CD rate of 3.41% APY
Extended drive-through hours (7:30 a.m. - 6:00 p.m. weekdays, Saturday morning service)
iChecking account earns interest and rewards on daily balance usage
Zelle integration for convenient peer-to-peer money transfers
Money Market Account combining checking and savings features
Long operational history since 1911 with emphasis on personalized service
Dedicated business banking products including business checking and credit cards
cons: Limited geographic footprint—only branches in Tyler and Lindale, Texas area; not accessible to out-of-state customers
Website does not advertise mortgage lending, investment services, or wealth management products
No mention of mobile banking app capabilities or digital-only account opening
Limited information about business loan products or commercial credit lines available
Saturday hours only 8:00 a.m. - 12:00 p.m., restricting weekend banking access
best_for: Customers in the Tyler/Lindale, Texas area seeking local community banking with personalized service
Savers prioritizing FDIC-insured deposit products with competitive CD and money market rates
Small businesses in East Texas requiring local checking accounts and business banking services
Customers who prefer traditional in-person banking over digital-only institutions
diagnosis: American State Bank is best for residents of the Tyler, Texas area seeking a community banking relationship with competitive deposit rates and personalized service. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—the bank only serves customers in the immediate Tyler/Lindale region with physical branches, making it unsuitable for remote or out-of-state banking needs; customers elsewhere should seek banks with wider geographic reach or digital platforms.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
